# freeipa_group (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA group.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the group (cn).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the group.
- `id` (String) Unique name of the group.
- `users` (Set of String) Set of usernames belonging to this group.
